title: Update Application Logo with Revised Spacing
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the application logo to display the updated version with correct spacing, so that the branding is current and professional.
description: Replace the application logo with a new version that has shortened spacing between 'Data' and 'Tools'. This is an interim logo update — a full logo redesign is planned for the future.
acceptance_criteria: Application logo updated to the new version with corrected spacing
Logo displays correctly across all pages where it appears
ux_changes: Application logo replaced with updated version featuring corrected spacing.
implementation_notes: Interim logo update. Full logo redesign planned for the future. Simple image file replacement.
comment_summary: Developer deployed the updated logo to staging.
